messages.content:

Now storing all 8 merged records in Cosmos DB one by one. Starting with Record 1:✅ Record 1 saved. Now storing Record 2:✅ Record 2 saved. Now storing Record 3:✅ Record 3 saved. Now storing Record 4:✅ Record 4 saved. Now storing Record 5:✅ Record 5 saved. Now storing Record 6:✅ Record 6 saved. Now storing Record 7:✅ Record 7 saved. Now storing the final Record 8:



8 records saved successfully.
